De Bruijn Graph AssemblyBLAST Seed ExtensionHidden Markov ModelsUPGMA Tree Building

BLAST Seed Extension

Ungapped extension with BLOSUM62 scoring and X-drop termination

Parameters
Threshold (T)
Min seed BLOSUM62 score
Min Score
Min score to report
Critical Drop (X)
Max drop before stop
Seed
Included (at max)
Dropping
Stop (drop > X)
Current position
Enter two amino acid sequences, specify a 3-AA seed, and click Run Extension to begin.
